How Jeff Bezos Upended The Washington Post
Jeff Bezos bought The Washington Post in 2013, and it worked well at first. But in the past two years, he has been involved in a series of jarring upheavals in strategy and leadership.
Frustrated by financial losses, Bezos is demanding that The Post embrace some of the same ideas he uses at Amazon, including a focus on data and efficiency.
Many people have wondered whether Bezos is still committed to The Post. He has insisted he doesn’t want to sell and has spurned seven offers.
